tests.description: security-agent.md must mention agent-run-id receipt or Incremental Module Gate after gap patch

command: import re,sys; content=open('.claude/agents/security-agent.md',encoding='utf-8').read(); sys.exit(0) if re.search(r'agent-run-id|Incremental Module Gate|module.*gate', content, re.I) else sys.exit(1)

tests.description: build-agent.md must mention build phase attestation requirement (prepare-phase or phase-ci)

command: import re,sys; content=open('.claude/agents/build-agent.md',encoding='utf-8').read(); sys.exit(0) if re.search(r'attestation|gates prepare-phase|phase-ci', content, re.I) else sys.exit(1)

tests.description: build-agent.md must mention ACCEPT and deploy after acceptance gate

command: import re,sys; content=open('.claude/agents/build-agent.md',encoding='utf-8').read(); sys.exit(0) if re.search(r'PIPELINE_DEPLOY|deploy|ACCEPT', content, re.I) else sys.exit(1)

tests.description: agent-factory-agent.md must mention CODEOWNERS protection of .claude/agents/**

command: import re,sys; content=open('.claude/agents/agent-factory-agent.md',encoding='utf-8').read(); sys.exit(0) if re.search(r'CODEOWNERS|PR.*review|review.*required|protected', content, re.I) else sys.exit(1)

tests.description: protocol-evolution-agent.md must mention CODEOWNERS and PR review requirement

command: import re,sys; content=open('.claude/agents/protocol-evolution-agent.md',encoding='utf-8').read(); sys.exit(0) if re.search(r'CODEOWNERS|PR.*review|review.*required|protected', content, re.I) else sys.exit(1)

tests.description: test-harness-agent.md must mention ACCEPT triggers deploy or mention deployment path

command: import re,sys; content=open('.claude/agents/test-harness-agent.md',encoding='utf-8').read(); sys.exit(0) if re.search(r'deploy|PIPELINE_DEPLOY|ACCEPT.*deploy|deploy.*ACCEPT', content, re.I) else sys.exit(1)

tests.description: pm-agent.md pipeline_complete summary must mention deploy path or auto-deploy on ACCEPT

command: import re,sys; content=open('.claude/agents/pm-agent.md',encoding='utf-8').read(); sys.exit(0) if re.search(r'PIPELINE_DEPLOY|deploy.*path|accept.*deploy|G:.*터미널', content, re.I) else sys.exit(1)

tests.description: Edge: security-agent.md gate section must still say pipeline.py sec is orchestrator-only (no accidental removal)

command: import re,sys; content=open('.claude/agents/security-agent.md',encoding='utf-8').read(); sys.exit(0) if re.search(r'orchestrator.*\uc804\ub2f4|orc.*only|CRITICAL.*pipeline.*sec|\uc624\ucf00\uc2a4\ud2b8\ub808\uc774\ud130.*\uc804\uc6a9', content, re.I) else sys.exit(1)
